title: Qulun
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Quote|The closer we draw to the overclan, the less inclined a lesser clan like the Qulun would be to risk interfering.|The clanless [[Kyakhta]], to the Jedi and their companions|<ref name=":0">''[[The Approaching Storm]]''</ref>}}
'''Qulun''' were a group of clan-based traders on [[Ansion/Legends|Ansion]]. As a distinct trading faction among the [[Alwari]] tribes,<ref name="The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> they were generally disliked (except for the goods they offered) and not recognized as traditional Alwari, yet moved freely among both the Alwari and the city-dwellers. They traveled on [[sadain]] mounts, which were also used as beasts of burden.<ref name=":0" />

One of their favored trading centers was the city of [[Dashbalar]], to which a Qulun caravan was en route in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] with captive [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] when [[Tooqui]] incited a stampede of native [[lorqual]] into their [[Qulun camp|camp]], resulting in the freeing of the Jedi and their [[Bulgan|companions]] and also a [[Skirmish in the Qulun camp|skirmish]].<ref name=":0" />

[[Baiuntu]] was a leader of a Qulun clan.<ref name=":0" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Approaching Storm]]''
*[[The Approaching Storm (abridged audiobook)|''The Approaching Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
